label: Ritual outcome comp (role change participants)
description: Variant of ParticipantCount used for role-change rituals. Quality is 1 if enough colony members attended, 0 otherwise.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is 1 or 0 based on attendance threshold.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping participant count (X) to quality offset (Y). Inherited from ParticipantCount.
